// Sokoban (text mode) for Apple 1 - v3 with undo + move counter
// 3453 bytes  (uses apple1_gen2.cfg, 7552 B budget)
// 47 levels: 3 teaching + Microban I #1..#44 by D.W. Skinner (2000)
// Port by VERHILLE Arnaud, 2026
// Keyboard: W/A/S/D (QWERTY) or Z/Q/S/D (AZERTY)
// U=undo last move  R=reset level  N=next level
// Level data is RLE-compressed (sokoban_levels.inc) via sokoban_common.inc.
// NOTE: state grid at $4000 -> needs extended RAM (not stock Apple 1)
// Type 280R in Woz Monitor to run
